mapper.select: SELECT * FROM release_assets WHERE download_token = #{downloadToken} AND published = true
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM release_assets WHERE LOWER(stored_file_name) = LOWER(#{storedFileName})
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM release_assets WHERE software_type_id = #{softwareTypeId}

SELECT * FROM release_assets
AND published = #{published}
AND (middleware_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR description LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR original_file_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%'))
ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO release_assets (middleware_name, software_type_id, version, platform, description, released_at, published, download_token, original_file_name, stored_file_name, content_type, file_size, download_count, standard_document_id, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{middlewareName}, #{softwareTypeId}, #{version}, #{platform}, #{description}, #{releasedAt}, #{published}, #{downloadToken}, #{originalFileName}, #{storedFileName}, #{contentType}, #{fileSize}, #{downloadCount}, #{standardDocumentId}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE release_assets SET middleware_name=#{middlewareName}, software_type_id=#{softwareTypeId}, version=#{version}, platform=#{platform}, description=#{description}, released_at=#{releasedAt}, published=#{published}, download_token=#{downloadToken}, original_file_name=#{originalFileName}, stored_file_name=#{storedFileName}, content_type=#{contentType}, file_size=#{fileSize}, standard_document_id=#{standardDocumentId}, updated_at=#{updatedAt} WHERE id=#{id}
UPDATE release_assets SET download_count = download_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
